settings.text: From weekly maintenance to one-time deep cleans, we have a plan for every space.

settings.title: Residential Cleaning
settings.description: Regular house cleaning tailored to your home. We handle kitchens, bathrooms, bedrooms, living areas, and everything in between. Weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly schedules available.

settings.title: Commercial Cleaning
settings.description: After-hours cleaning for offices, retail, and industrial spaces. We work around your schedule so your team arrives to a clean workspace every morning. Custom contracts available.

settings.title: Deep Cleaning
settings.description: Intensive top-to-bottom cleaning that covers baseboards, light fixtures, cabinet interiors, behind appliances, and all the areas regular cleaning misses. Perfect for seasonal resets.

settings.title: Move-In / Move-Out
settings.description: Get your deposit back or start fresh in your new place. We clean every surface, appliance interior, window track, and cabinet shelf. Designed to pass even the strictest inspections.

settings.title: Kitchens & Dining
settings.description: Countertops, sinks, and stovetops wiped and sanitized. Cabinet fronts degreased. Appliance exteriors polished. Floors swept and mopped. Trash emptied and bins wiped down.

settings.title: Bathrooms
settings.description: Toilets, tubs, and showers scrubbed and disinfected. Mirrors and glass polished streak-free. Tile grout cleaned. Fixtures descaled. Floors mopped and baseboards wiped.

settings.title: Living Areas & Bedrooms
settings.description: All surfaces dusted including shelving, furniture, and decor. Beds made with fresh linens if provided. Floors vacuumed and hard floors mopped. Light switches and door handles sanitized.

settings.text: No hidden fees, no surprises. We quote by the job, not by the hour, so you know exactly what you're paying before we start.

settings.features:
+ Flat-rate pricing per visit
+ Free in-home estimates
+ No contracts required
+ Supplies and equipment included

settings.question: What cleaning products do you use?
settings.answer: We use eco-friendly, non-toxic products that are safe for children, pets, and people with allergies. All products are EPA Safer Choice certified. If you have specific product preferences, we're happy to accommodate.

settings.question: Do I need to be home during the cleaning?
settings.answer: No. Many of our clients provide a key or access code. Our team members are background-checked, bonded, and insured. We'll lock up when we leave and send you a completion notification.

settings.question: How do I change or skip a scheduled cleaning?
settings.answer: You can reschedule or skip any visit with 24 hours' notice at no charge. Changes can be made by phone, email, or through your online account. Late cancellations may incur a partial fee.

settings.question: What does a deep clean include that regular cleaning doesn't?
settings.answer: Deep cleans cover behind and under appliances, inside cabinets, light fixtures, baseboards, door frames, window tracks, vent covers, and all areas that aren't part of a standard maintenance visit.

settings.question: Do you bring your own supplies?
settings.answer: Yes. We arrive with everything needed — cleaning solutions, microfiber cloths, vacuum, mop, and any specialty tools. You don't need to provide anything unless you prefer us to use specific products.

settings.title: Ready to Book?
settings.text:
Call (555) 718-2200 or email hello@sparkhaus.co for a free quote.

Same-day availability for most residential jobs.
